title: RP Import Checks Under a WDA
alt: Checklist of five Responsible Person receipt checks for importing medicines under a WDA

items.label: Authorisation verification
items.desc: Confirm the supplier holds the correct authorisation for the transaction.

items.label: Approved-country confirmation
items.desc: Verify the product qualifies under the import list and retain evidence.

items.label: QP certification status
items.desc: Get documented proof the batch is certified, or it cannot be received.

items.label: FMD safety features
items.desc: Verify and, where required, decommission the unique identifier.

items.label: Transport & temperature
items.desc: Check temperature and shipping records against labelled storage.
